text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy.
An integrated junior and senior high where
horsegirls are trained to compete in the
Twinkle Series.

Talented horsegirls gather here from all
over the country. But… many finish their
careers without a single win.

Even so, chasing the view at the top, they
keep running. And among them…

Buena Vista stands out.
Bright and dazzling.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Mm, feels good.
I'm heading out!

Bathed in warm sunlight, she runs.
Her form, her stride, all more than solid.
But what truly stands out — is the sharpness
of her final acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hah—
Yaaaahhh!!

From her slender frame, you'd never expect
it… That soaring run makes your heart race.

Cheerful and bright,
she shines even off the track.

text_block_list.name: English Teacher
text_block_list.text: Alright then, Buena Vista. Please translate: "Where should I go to get my horseshoes fixed?"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Um, horseshoes are cleats, so… "Where should I go to get my cleats repaired?" …That's it!

text_block_list.name: English Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perfect grammar and pronunciation.
Excellent.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: (Oooh…)

She excels in academics, and is well-liked
by her teachers. But more than that…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Sniff… hic…
Uu…

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
W-What's wrong, Buena-chan…!?
…Wait, did you make her cry?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
N-No, that's not it!?
I just told her the teacher praised me for
cleaning earlier…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Uuuu…!
That really makes you happy, doesn't it…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You always cleaned everything, even the
places no one could see.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad they noticed…!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Ah…
…Hehe, yeah. Thanks!

Buena Vista is deeply sensitive. She truly
shares in others' feelings. And because of
that…

text_block_list.name: Horsegirls
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's Buena!
Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Bye-bye!
See you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl A
text_block_list.text:
Buena is… a top student, super talented at running,
and popular too. I can't believe such a perfect girl exists.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl B
text_block_list.text:
Right?
She's like someone out of our league.

"Out of our league."
It really does suit her.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Ah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe.
It still feels a little strange, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Because you've always been "big brother."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Because you've always been "big sister."

Buena Vista, with a future sure to shine
ahead of her, is my trainee… and my
childhood friend.

I first met her when we were very young.
When I moved in next door, her family
welcomed me warmly.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Buena, you have something you wanted
to give <username>, right? …Go on.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Buena, you have something you wanted
to give <username>, right? …Go on.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Um… um… big brother.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Um… um… big sister.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Buu-chan, um…
wants to play with big brother.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Buu-chan, um…
wants to play with big sister.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Buu-chan is saying hello.
A "let's be friends" hello…

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe… yeah!
Hey, let's play, big brother!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe… yeah!
Hey, let's play, big sister!

She used to trail behind me, like a little sister.
That changed the first time I saw her run
seriously…

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: Thump! …Taaahhh!!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… yeah, not yet!
Yaaahhh!!

That run was dazzling,
far too brilliant to ignore…
And in my young heart, a dream was born.
"Someday, I'll become Buena Vista's trainer."

The day I finally told her that dream,
her eyes welled up, just a little…
And then she smiled.

After she enrolled at Tracen Academy,
I followed after her, became a trainer,
and proved my resolve… And then, the moment
came when that first dream would come true.
choice_data_list: Will you sign a trainee contract with me?
Will you sign a trainee contract with me?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Yes, of course.
My Trainer!

At last, we've reached the starting line.
From here on… we'll chase that dream
together.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Shall we get going? Did you bring the
documents?

Her debut in the Twinkle Series has finally
been set. We were on our way to submit
the paperwork.
choice_data_list: Wait, let me check it one more time.
Wait, let me check it one more time.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But when you showed me yesterday,
everything seemed fine…
choice_data_list: It's a big first step. I want it perfect.
It's a big first step. I want it perfect.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe.
You really care about this, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(You really are dependable.
Now, just like back then…)

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So, you'll be making your debut with
<username>, huh? That's wonderful.
…Though I had a feeling, it would turn
out this way.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So, you'll be making your debut with
<username>, huh? That's wonderful.
…Though I had a feeling, it would turn
out this way.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You've always been so attached…
Always sticking close, never wanting to leave.
…Some things never change.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: M-Mom…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(…Yeah, I really was.
Ever since we first met…
Because I always wanted to be together.)

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
…Wait, big brother!
Wait for meee…!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
…Wait, big sister!
Wait for meee…!

text_block_list.name: Big brother
text_block_list.text: "Buena, you followed me all the way here…!?"

text_block_list.name: Big sister
text_block_list.text: "Buena, you followed me all the way here…!?"

text_block_list.name: Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
Hey, come on…
What are we supposed to do with a kid that
tiny? We can't go on our adventure like this.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ah… um, but…
Buu-chan wants to go with big brother…

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ah… um, but…
Buu-chan wants to go with big sister…

text_block_list.name: Big brother
text_block_list.text:
"Buena, it's okay. Let's go together! I'll
protect you, so don't worry, just stay with me."

text_block_list.name: Big sister
text_block_list.text:
"Buena, it's okay. Let's go together! I'll
protect you, so don't worry, just stay with me."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: (Because you were strong… and so cool.)

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Hic… uuu…
M-Mom… where are you…?

text_block_list.name: Big brother
text_block_list.text: "Found you! Buena…!"

text_block_list.name: Big sister
text_block_list.text: "Found you! Buena…!"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
…!
Big brother…!?

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
…!
Big sister…!?

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Y-You're all muddy…
Are you okay…?

text_block_list.name: Big brother
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, I tripped while running…
Come on, let's go home. Everyone's waiting."

text_block_list.name: Big sister
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, I tripped while running…
Come on, let's go home. Everyone's waiting."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Because you were… so kind,
truly… a wonderful person.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I want to live up to that.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Your expectations. Your dreams.
I want to make all of them come true.
And if I do…)

text_block_list.name: Big brother
text_block_list.text:
"You're amazing, Buena, amazing, amazing…!
Your running is really — so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Big sister
text_block_list.text:
"You're amazing, Buena, amazing, amazing…!
Your running is really — so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(…You'll show me that shining look in your
eyes again, right?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing!
So, how were the documents?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Um, then…
I'll fill them out first, okay?

Among the documents for her debut,
there was one page missing both our
signatures.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Sorry.
I just… got a bit emotional.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We really are…
going to take this on together.
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's make your dream come true.
Yeah. Let's make your dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…No.
…It's our dream.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Alright!
Time to sign～

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Bu… e… na… Vis… ta…
There. Your turn, Trainer!
Want to use my pen?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that fountain pen…!
Is it your graduation gift from trainer school?

When I was given that pen, it made
everything feel real… that I was truly
becoming a trainer. Into this pen, I pour
all my resolve and responsibility…

After staring for a while at the document
bearing both our names... our eyes met.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Trainer.
Let's make it come true.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Our dream.
Something even greater than what we saw
that day…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —It's a promise, okay♪

Chasing a view yet unseen…
Together with Buena Vista, the days of
training toward our Twinkle Series debut
begin!
